creator: naddy@mips.rhein-neckar.de
text:
Maxim Sobolev:

> How about to take into account my previous followup and close this PR (less is
> already 340).

I should point out that the UTF-8 patch whose inclusion I suggested
in this PR still has not been included. However, the upstream
version of less is already at 346 and has contained the UTF-8 patch
since 344. Updating the version number and the MD5 checksums appears
to suffice to bring the port up to 346.

Somebody who cares about colorls and -DCOLOR_LESS should take a
look at patch-ab. Last time I looked, this appeared partially
broken.

Finally: No hard feelings against Andrey, but since he apparently
doesn't have the time to keep this port current, how about pointing
MAINTAINER to somebody who does (or ports@)?

-- 
Christian "naddy" Weisgerber                  naddy@mips.rhein-neckar.de
